name: Spatial Relationship Queries
description: Queries that reason about objects using spatial relationships such as proximity, containment, or relative position.
example: What tools are near the workbench?

name: Constraint-Based Queries
description: Queries that impose constraints such as safety, noise, power source, or user limitations on the results.
example: What tools can drill wood without electricity?

name: Hypothetical Queries
description: Queries that explore alternative scenarios or reason about changes to the space or available objects.
example: What could I use to drill wood if the drill were unavailable?
